exercises.name: Wide-Grip Pull-Up
exercises.notes: Full dead hang. Drive elbows DOWN to hips. 3s lowering. Add weight belt when 8 is easy.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Drive elbows to hips NOT back. Full stretch at top. 3s lowering. Feel lat — not bicep.

exercises.name: One-Arm DB Row
exercises.notes: Full stretch at bottom. Elbow drives PAST hip. No torso rotation. One side done, then other.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Arms slightly bent. Lead with elbows — NOT hands. Use handles as wrist rests only.

exercises.name: DB Preacher Curl
exercises.notes: Nippard S-tier. Arm angled = tension at stretch. 3s lowering. No momentum. Best peak builder.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Neutral grip. Builds brachialis — the muscle that pushes bicep UP. 2s lowering. Full ROM.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl (EZ-bar)
exercises.notes: Overhand grip. Makes forearm pop from the front. FOREARM FINISHER — go back to back with wrist curl.

exercises.name: Farmer's Carry
exercises.notes: Heaviest DBs possible. Slow walk. Grip should fail before you stop. Toji forearms are built here.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Round spine DOWN to floor. Weighted = progressive abs.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.notes: Control the swing. Tuck pelvis at top. 2s lowering.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.notes: Squeeze abs+glutes+quads together. Breathe normally.

warmup.name: Stick Pull-Aparts
warmup.focus: Rear Delts · Rotator Cuff · Upper Traps

cooldown: Bar hang 20s · Lat doorway stretch 25s each · Bicep wall stretch 25s each · Wrist flexor 20s each · 5 deep breaths.
whatToTake: Pre-Workout: 1 cup black coffee / water + pre-workout supplement.
Intra-Workout: Water (stay hydrated).
Post-Workout: 1 scoop SuperYou Fermented Yeast Protein with water.

exercises.name: Incline DB Press (45°)
exercises.notes: 3s descent. Elbows 60°, not 90°. Squeeze chest at top. Your primary chest exercise. No barbell.

exercises.name: Flat DB Press
exercises.notes: Full stretch at bottom. Control throughout. Feel chest — not shoulders — doing the work.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Pec Flye
exercises.notes: S-TIER per Nippard. Cables keep tension throughout. Arms slightly bent. Squeeze at centre.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: S-TIER for V-taper. Cable at hand height. Max tension at stretch. 3s lowering. No shrugging.

exercises.name: Overhead Cable Ext. — Bar
exercises.notes: S+ TIER. Nippard's #1 tricep. Elbows forward. Full extension overhead. 40% more growth than pushdowns.

exercises.name: Bar Pressdown (cable)
exercises.notes: Elbows pinned at sides. Full extension. Overhand grip. Lateral head = outermost visible arm.

exercises.name: 1-Arm DB Overhead Ext.
exercises.notes: One arm. Better stretch than two-arm. 3s lowering. Long head emphasis. Arm behind ear fully.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
exercises.notes: Don't sag hips. Roll as far as lower back stays neutral.

exercises.name: Side Plank + Hip Dip
exercises.notes: Obliques = waist taper. Tight waist makes shoulders look wider.

exercises.name: Dead Bug (slow)
exercises.notes: Low back glued to mat. Exhale as extend. Best spine health exercise.

cooldown: Chest doorway stretch 25s each · Overhead tricep stretch 25s each · Cross-body shoulder 25s · 5 deep breaths.
whatToTake: Pre-Workout: 1 cup black coffee / water + pre-workout supplement.
Intra-Workout: Water (stay hydrated).
Post-Workout: 1 scoop SuperYou Fermented Yeast Protein with water.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Break parallel. 3s descent. Knees track toes. Brace core. Nippard's #1 exercise overall.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift (DB)
exercises.notes: Hip hinge ONLY. Push hips BACK. 3s lowering. Feel hamstring load at bottom. No squatting.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Full ROM. 3s lowering on sets 2 and 3. Drive through whole foot. Don't lock knees out.

exercises.name: Walking DB Lunges
exercises.notes: S-TIER glutes per Nippard. Long stride + slight forward lean. Best glute exercise overall.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Pause at bottom stretch. Pause at top. Both pauses matter. Full ROM only. Go heavy.

exercises.name: Plate-Loaded Neck Flexion
exercises.notes: Lie on bench, shoulders at edge, plate on forehead wrapped in towel. Slow curl. Nippard neck guide.

exercises.name: Neck Extension (off bench)
exercises.notes: Lie face down at bench edge. Plate on back of head with towel. Controlled extension. Never rush.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch (weighted)
exercises.notes: Add weight every 2 weeks. Abs need progressive overload too.

exercises.name: Hollow Body Hold
exercises.notes: Low back DOWN. Arms overhead. Hardest core endurance exercise.

exercises.name: Pallof Press (cable)
exercises.notes: Core anti-rotation. Functional. Set cable at chest height. Press out and hold.

warmup.name: Slow Ankle Circles + Bodyweight Calf Raise

cooldown: Pigeon pose 30s each · Seated hamstring 30s each · Standing quad 30s each · Calf wall stretch 30s · 5 deep breaths.
whatToTake: Pre-Workout: 1 cup black coffee / water + pre-workout supplement.
Intra-Workout: Water (stay hydrated).
Post-Workout: 1 scoop SuperYou Fermented Yeast Protein with water.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported DB Row
exercises.notes: S-TIER. Face down on incline bench. Zero cheating. Full stretch. Elbows back and high.

exercises.name: Cable Row (V-bar)
exercises.notes: S-TIER. Full stretch forward each rep. Pull to navel. Back density. Squeeze blades at end.

exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: S-TIER. Different angle from Monday's wide grip. Hits lower lat. Drive elbows to hips.

exercises.name: DB Shrug
exercises.notes: Slow controlled shrug. 2s hold at top. Trap fullness above shirt collar = iconic look.

exercises.name: Face-Away Bayesian Curl
exercises.notes: Nippard's #1 bicep. Face away from cable. Arm behind body. Max stretch + tension. Best peak.

exercises.name: Machine Preacher Curl
exercises.notes: S-TIER. Constant tension. Can't cheat. 3s lowering every rep. Peak bicep isolation.

exercises.name: Incline DB Curl
exercises.notes: Arms hang fully behind body. Maximum gravity stretch. 3s lowering. Long head emphasis.

exercises.name: Plate Pinch + Wrist Roller
exercises.notes: Plate pinch 30s, then immediately wrist roller. Back to back. Forearm endurance and mass.

exercises.name: Plate Neck Flexion (bench edge)
exercises.notes: Plate on forehead (towel). Slow curl. Never jerk.

exercises.name: Neck Lateral Flexion (DB hold)
exercises.notes: Hold DB at side, tilt ear to shoulder. Other hand on bench.

exercises.name: Plank Variations (standard→side→RKC)
exercises.notes: Progress from standard to RKC plank — squeeze everything.

exercises.name: V-Ups or Tuck Crunch
exercises.notes: Full V if possible. Tuck crunch if V is too hard yet.

exercises.name: Superman Hold (mat)
exercises.notes: Face down. Lift arms + legs simultaneously. Spinal health.

cooldown: Wrist flexor stretch 25s each · Wrist extensor 25s each · Lat bar hang 20s · Neck side tilt 20s each side · 5 deep breaths.
whatToTake: Pre-Workout: 1 cup black coffee / water + pre-workout supplement.
Intra-Workout: Water (stay hydrated).
Post-Workout: 1 scoop SuperYou Fermented Yeast Protein with water.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Fresh shoulders today = best lateral session of the week. 3s lowering. S-TIER V-taper builder.

exercises.name: Arnold Press (seated DB)
exercises.notes: Rotate palms OUT as you press. Hits front, side, rear all in one movement. 3s lowering.

exercises.name: Reverse Cable Crossover
exercises.notes: S-TIER rear delt. High pulley cross-body. Arms open like wings. Rear delt caps the shoulder.

exercises.name: Barbell Skull Crusher
exercises.notes: S-TIER. Heaviest tricep exercise. Lower to forehead. 3s descent. Nippard S-tier. Mass builder.

exercises.name: Overhead Cable Ext. — Rope
exercises.notes: A-TIER. Rope variation. Full long-head stretch. Elbows forward. Full extension every rep.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: A-TIER. Hands shoulder-width. Elbows tucked. Compound tricep mass. Heavier than most isolations.

exercises.name: Forearm Finisher (superset)
exercises.notes: Seated DB wrist curl 15 reps → immediately reverse curl 15 reps. No rest between. 30s after each superset.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout (or sliding towel)
exercises.notes: Towel on floor works as wheel. Knees ok at first. Don't sag hips.

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch (slow)
exercises.notes: Slow rotation. Elbow to opposite knee. 2s hold each side.

exercises.name: Reverse Crunch
exercises.notes: Curl pelvis up toward chest. Slow lowering. No momentum.

cooldown: Overhead tricep stretch 25s each · Wrist flex+extend 25s each · Cross-body shoulder 25s · 5 deep breaths.
whatToTake: Pre-Workout: 1 cup black coffee / water + pre-workout supplement.
Intra-Workout: Water (stay hydrated).
Post-Workout: 1 scoop SuperYou Fermented Yeast Protein with water.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat (DB)
exercises.notes: S-TIER. Front shin vertical. Chest tall. Rear knee near floor. Deeper stretch than back squat.

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Higher rep than Wednesday. Same hinge. 2s lowering. Hamstrings burning by rep 12.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: A-TIER. Quad isolation. 3s lowering. Nippard says this is fine to use — not dangerous.

exercises.name: Machine Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: A-TIER #1 middle glute per Nippard. Drive heels. Full hip extension. 2s squeeze at top.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Seated = targets soleus. Different from Wednesday's standing. Both needed for complete calves.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch (weighted)
exercises.notes: Add weight every 2 weeks. Track the weight like any other lift.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise (straight)
exercises.notes: Straight legs when strong enough. Tuck pelvis up at top.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
exercises.notes: Full extension = advanced. Roll as far as lower back holds.

exercises.name: Side Plank + Hip Dip
exercises.notes: Oblique density = visible waist taper. Do not skip.

exercises.name: Pallof Press (cable)
exercises.notes: Functional core. Cable at chest. Press out and hold 2s. Resist rotation.

exercises.name: Hollow Body Hold
exercises.notes: Arms overhead. Low back down. Hardest endurance exercise here.

exercises.name: HIIT Cardio / Zone 2 Incline Treadmill
exercises.notes: Odd weeks HIIT: 30s max sprint + 90s walk on treadmill/bike, 8 rounds (20 min). Even weeks Incline treadmill: 12% grade, 5.5–6 kmph, increase 1% every 3 weeks (25 min).

cooldown: Pigeon pose 30s each · Hip flexor lunge 30s each · Seated hamstring 30s each · Calf wall stretch 30s · 5 deep breaths.
whatToTake: Pre-Workout: 1 cup black coffee / water + pre-workout supplement.
Intra-Workout: Water (stay hydrated).
Post-Workout: 1 scoop SuperYou Fermented Yeast Protein with water.

exercises.name: Easy Walk
exercises.notes: Conversation pace. Not a workout — just blood flow.

exercises.name: Foam Roll
exercises.notes: Lats, quads, hamstrings, upper back, calves. 60 sec per area.

exercises.name: Thoracic Spine Mobility
exercises.notes: Cat-cow 10 reps, thread-the-needle 30s each side, child's pose 45s.

exercises.name: Wrist and Forearm Stretch
exercises.notes: Forearm training stiffens tendons over the week.

exercises.name: Neck Stretches
exercises.notes: Lateral tilt 20s each side, chin tucks 10 reps. Protects neck from training load.

cooldown: Foam roll lats, quads, hamstrings, upper back, calves. 60 sec per area.
whatToTake: Weekly Prep: Boil eggs for 3 days. Prep oats. Load ₹750 on PhonePe wallet.
Nutrition: 1 scoop SuperYou Fermented Yeast Protein with water.
